version_delta: Project governance validation now rejects root human-entry files that start as compatibility indexes or link pages and requires owner-readable title/summary tokens.

ci_attestation_subject: Other8 S2PAT03 validates that project human-entry files are owner-readable content and not compatibility indexes or link pages.
summary: S2PAT03 adds a lightweight read-only human-entry quality gate to project governance validation, preserving human-readable truth without adding write-mode governance calculation to ordinary development actions.
rollback: Revert scripts/validate_project_governance.py, the focused tests, and this run manifest.
unresolved_risks: S2PCT01 still needs changed-scope impact-map tightening so ordinary non-product work does not select excluded projects.
self_reference_policy: content_tree_hash excludes this manifest because a file cannot contain its own final hash before commit; changed_files_actual includes this manifest for diff coverage.
